purpose: Generate a code-grounded mobile interaction sketch for the Runweave App support diagnostics entry points and independent support-log sheet.

codeGrounding.loginEntry: app/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx currently owns the login form and can host a low-priority bottom action.
codeGrounding.homeEntry: app/src/pages/HomePage.tsx currently has a header nav with Refresh and Logout actions.
codeGrounding.terminalEntry: app/src/pages/AppTerminalPage.tsx currently has a compact terminal detail header, refresh action, terminal body, composer, and bottom tabs.
codeGrounding.independenceConstraint: Support logs must live under an App-local support-logs module; pages should only open the sheet with scope metadata.

imagePrompt: High-fidelity mobile app interaction sketch for Runweave iOS App support diagnostics. Three dark-mode iPhone screens side by side. Requirement: each page exposes only one support-log entry point named '日志上报'. Login screen: bottom text action '日志上报'. Home screen: Runweave header, project list, top-right ellipsis menu open with exactly one diagnostics item '日志上报'. Terminal detail: compact header, terminal area, composer above bottom tabs, top-right ellipsis menu open with exactly one diagnostics item '日志上报'. A bottom sheet titled '日志上报' shows panel-internal rows '分享日志', '下载日志', '清除本地日志' and metadata preview: app version, route, network, terminal id. Include small caption 'Support Logs Service - independent module'. No floating debug bubble. No Share/Download diagnostics in page menus. No tokens, terminal output body, file contents, or sensitive values. Ionic iOS dark UI, black background, #0b1220 panels, #0c1118 headers, #eef3f8 text, #9aa8b6 muted text, #42d986 status dot, 44px tap targets, max 8px card radius, compact polished utility style.
